data.headline: Broker Direct Realty
data.body: Led by Diana Reyes, Broker Direct Realty is a full-service brokerage serving Newark and Montclair with a commitment to excellence, mentorship, and results. From luxury condos to historic brownstones, our team delivers personalized service backed by deep market knowledge.

data.title: Our Services
data.subtitle: Comprehensive real estate solutions for every client.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.description: Expert guidance through every step of the home buying process, from pre-approval to closing day. We negotiate fiercely on your behalf.

items.title: Seller Services
items.description: Strategic pricing, professional staging, magazine-quality photography, and multi-channel marketing to maximize your home's value.

items.title: Luxury Properties
items.description: Discreet marketing, private showings, and a curated network of qualified buyers for high-end Newark and Montclair properties.

items.title: Investment Advisory
items.description: Multi-family analysis, rental yield projections, and portfolio strategy for investors targeting the northern New Jersey market.

items.title: Relocation Support
items.description: Neighborhood tours, school district analysis, and commute planning for families relocating to the Newark-Montclair corridor.

data.title: Our Process
data.subtitle: A proven approach to every transaction.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We start with a confidential conversation to understand your goals, timeline, and priorities.

steps.title: Market Strategy
steps.description: Our team prepares a detailed market analysis and customized strategy tailored to your situation.

steps.title: Execute & Close
steps.description: From showings to negotiations to closing, we handle every detail so you can focus on what matters.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: A selection of properties sold by our team across Newark and Montclair.

data.title: Client Reviews
data.subtitle: What our clients say about working with Broker Direct Realty.

items.text: Diana and her team sold our Montclair home in under a week for $40K over asking. Their staging and marketing were incredible — we had 12 showings in the first weekend alone.

Marcus helped us find the perfect condo in downtown Newark. As first-time buyers, we had a million questions and he answered every single one with patience and expertise. Could not recommend more highly.
We relocated from California and Elena made the entire process seamless. Virtual tours, neighborhood guides, school comparisons — she covered everything before we even set foot in New Jersey.

Diana personally handled our investment property purchase. Her knowledge of the Newark market and rental yield analysis helped us make a confident decision. Already planning our next acquisition with her team.

data.title: Our Team
data.subtitle: Experienced agents dedicated to your success.

data.title: Contact Us
data.subtitle: Reach out to Broker Direct Realty for a complimentary consultation.
data.description: Whether you're buying, selling, or investing, our team is ready to help. Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

data.title: About Broker Direct Realty
bio: Founded by Diana Reyes in 2011, Broker Direct Realty has grown from a one-woman operation into a trusted full-service brokerage serving the Newark and Montclair communities. With over 300 transactions and $180M+ in sales volume, we bring deep local expertise to every deal.

Diana built this firm on a simple principle: treat every client like family. Our agents are hand-picked for their integrity, market knowledge, and commitment to going above and beyond. We don't just close deals — we build lasting relationships.
Beyond real estate, Diana is passionate about mentoring the next generation of agents and giving back to the communities we serve through partnerships with local nonprofits and youth programs.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.body: A member of our team will contact you shortly.
